message:

grep -n "module ahb2apb\|module.*apb_bridge\|module.*ahb.*apb" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_AMBA/rtl/amba.v 2>/dev/null
grep -rn "module.*ahb.*apb\|module.*apb.*bridge" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_AMBA/rtl/ 2>/dev/null | head -10` executed with exit code 0.

# Check the AHB-to-APB bridge implementation 
grep -n "module\|ahb2apb\|apb_bridge" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip/NC_AMBA/rtl/amba.v | head -20
